metadata.author: LivingPatch Contributors
metadata.description: Example pack showing how to add new species to the dataset without redefining existing ones

species.functional_description: Small reddish-brown wren with loud 'teakettle-teakettle-teakettle' song. Uses cavities and nest boxes. Year-round resident in PA.

symbiosis.notes: Carolina Wren uses abandoned Pileated Woodpecker cavities for nesting.
